# 3design Skills Guide

## Skill Catalog Source
- Canonical catalog: .agents/skills
- Load relevant SKILL.md files before applying a skill.

## Recommended Skills for @3design
- architecture-blueprint-generator
- enterprise-architecture-patterns

## Usage Notes
- Prefer repository-local skills before external research.
- Combine skills only when they directly improve task quality.
